title: The Technoblade Mod
description:
Technoblade and other technoblade related items and structures.
(new release)
body:
Hello! This is the Technoblade Mod, it adds many different features relating to Technoblade. I will explain everything to you!

![The Technoblade Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10a3ed4128927d4cc8ea6dca05db7cb1aaf47569.png)
What does it add?

Items-
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

*Crown Fragment* -Used to craft Techno Crown

*Technos Crown*

*Technos Sword* -Gives speed when holding

*Technoblade painting*

*Techno Ingot* -Use to craft armor

*Techno Ore* -Ore that spawns in caves of Technoland

*Technoblade armor set*

*Techno Summon* 
-Craftable item used to summon Technoblade

*Technoblade spawn egg*

</details>

Entitys-

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Technoblade** -Boss, has lots of health and deals lots of damage. Only attacks if you attack first. Drops a Crown Fragment.
![Technoblade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c4a05d157dee954b91025ce2282ef790d5ab873.png)
</details>

Biomes-


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

*Techno Land*
![Techno Land](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ecc41aceeb7f52606673c7d645f7d2ce487e62d5.png)

Piglins and pigs spawn in Techno Land. 

Custom technoblade music when you enter Techno Land
</details>



Structures-

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Bedwars airship
![Airship](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48177c63ff397eebdeded3d945b32356d92b9434.png)


Technoblade Statue
![Technoblade Statue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f5a1578a53f7bd79149077a6a05182ef2d817f0.png)
![Technoblade Statue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50908f6e42df1813664877ecb7875680c0f00254.png)
</details>
